description_long: This is a stylized biplane with a green fuselage and orange double wings, reminiscent of early 20th-century military aircraft. The fuselage is rounded and compact, with a cockpit positioned near the front and a pair of black cross insignias on the tail fins, suggesting a historical or vintage military theme. The wings are stacked in a biplane configuration, supported by struts, and the undercarriage features two large yellow floats, indicating it is designed for water landings. The tail section includes twin vertical stabilizers and a horizontal stabilizer, both colored green with black and white markings. The overall design is cartoonish, with exaggerated proportions and smooth, simplified surfaces.
description: A stylized green and orange biplane with twin floats for water landings, black cross insignias, and a compact, rounded fuselage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the green fuselage, orange biplane wings, and twin tail fins with black cross insignias.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the stacked orange wings, green nose, cockpit, and yellow floats beneath the fuselage.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with the cockpit and tail details visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the twin green tail fins, horizontal stabilizer, and the back of the orange wings and floats.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two sets of straight, mid-mounted wings stacked vertically and supported by struts; no winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles visible.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine (propeller not visible but implied by design).
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with twin vertical stabilizers and a single horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Twin fixed floats for water landings, no visible wheels.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open cockpit located near the nose of the fuselage, likely single-seat.
